What We Offer

Comprehensive dental care
for every need

From your first cleaning to a complete smile transformation — we handle it all in one clinic, right here in Bacoor.

🪥
Teeth Cleaning
Professional prophylaxis to remove plaque, tartar, and stains. Recommended every 6 months.
Most Popular
😁
Orthodontics / Braces
Metal, ceramic, and clear aligner options for children and adults. Personalized treatment plans.
High Demand
✨
Teeth Whitening
Professional bleaching for visibly brighter teeth — in-clinic or take-home kit options available.
Aesthetic
🦷
Dental Implants
Permanent tooth replacement that looks, feels, and functions exactly like your natural teeth.
Premium
👶
Pedia Dentistry
Gentle, child-friendly dental care in a warm environment. We make kids love the dentist.
Family
💎
Veneers & Crowns
Porcelain veneers, crowns, and bridges for a complete aesthetic and functional restoration.
Restorative
🩹
Tooth Extraction
Safe, gentle extractions including wisdom teeth removal with minimal discomfort.
General
🔬
Root Canal
Save your natural tooth with modern endodontic treatment. Painless, efficient, and precise.
Specialized
Why SmileBright

The clinic that treats you
like family

We built SmileBright for families in Bacoor and Cavite who deserve world-class dental care without the Metro Manila traffic.

01
Transparent, no-pressure pricing
We never quote you on the spot. Our coordinator sends a personalized, itemized quote so you can decide without pressure.
02
Complete family care under one roof
From toddlers to seniors — we handle the whole family's dental needs in one place, saving you time and travel.
03
AI-powered inquiry system
Our 24/7 virtual receptionist captures your inquiry instantly — our team responds with a quote within 24 hours.
04
Right here in Bacoor
No need to go to Manila. Premium dental care, locally. Easy access, less travel, more savings.
500+
Happy patients
12+
Dental services
24h
Quote turnaround
6days
Open per week
"Grabi ang ganda ng experience sa SmileBright. Yung coordinator super helpful, walang pressure sa pricing. Nagpaka-braces kami ng buong pamilya dito!"
— Maria S., Bacoor Cavite · Returning Patient
How It Works

Simple, stress-free
from inquiry to chair

No long forms. No confusing price lists. Just chat with Smile, and we take care of the rest.

1
Chat with Smile
Tell our AI receptionist what dental service you need — anytime, 24/7.
2
We capture your details
Name, contact, preferred schedule, and concerns — all noted automatically.
3
Quote sent to you
Our coordinator sends a personalized quotation to your email within 24 hours.
4
Book your appointment
Confirm your schedule, come in, and leave with a healthier, brighter smile.
Start Your Journey

Ready for a brighter smile?
Let's talk.

Send us your inquiry and our coordinator will reach out with a personalized quotation — no commitment needed, no price pressure, just care.

Free consultation · No pressure · Quote within 24 hours
